popularStory.headline: Cockayne Families
popularStory.description:
Is there another Old Derbshire family with such memorabilia for the historian, with so many vicissitudes and so many dramatic episodes, as the Cokaynes? 

Derbyshire provides much of the finest scener …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John V, Cokayne Esquire於1410年出生在英國德比夏爾阿希布恩 煙雨 馬普萊頓時，他的父親Sir John Cokayne MP23歲，母親Isabella Shirley34歲。他和Agnes Vernon至少有2個兒子。他去世於1504年5月在英國德比夏爾阿希布恩享年94歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾阿希布恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John V, Cokayne Esquire于1410年出生在英国德比夏爾阿希布恩 煙雨 馬普萊頓时，他的父亲Sir John Cokayne MP23岁，母亲Isabella Shirley34岁。他和Agnes Vernon至少有2个儿子。他去世于1504年5月在英国德比夏爾阿希布恩享年94岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾阿希布恩。

nameMeanings.name: Cokayne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cockayne
meanings: English (Midlands and Yorkshire): nickname for a dreamer, from Middle English cokayne ‘cloud-cuckooland’, the name of an imaginary paradise (Old French (pays de) cocaigne, from Middle Low German kōkenje, a diminutive of kōke ‘cake’, since in this land the houses were thought to be made of cake). It may also be a variant of Cocking or from the unflattering Middle English nickname cokin (Old French coquin) ‘disreputable person’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John V, Cokayne Esquire was born in 1410, in Ashbourne with Mapleton, Derbyshire, England, his father, Sir John Cokayne MP, was 23 and his mother, Isabella Shirley, was 34. He had at least 2 sons with Agnes Vernon. He died in May 1504, in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 94, and was buried in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John V, Cokayne Esquire est né en 1410, à Ashbourne with Mapleton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Cokayne MP, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Isabella Shirley, avait 34 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Agnes Vernon. Il est décédé en mai 1504, à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 94 ans, et a été enterré à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John V, Cokayne Esquire 1410 in Ashbourne with Mapleton, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Cokayne MP 23 und seine Mutter Isabella Shirley 34. Er hatte mit Agnes Vernon mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb im Mai 1504 im Alter von 94 Jahren in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England und wurde in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John V, Cokayne Esquire è nato il nel 1410 nel Ashbourne with Mapleton, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Cokayne MP, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Isabella Shirley, aveva 34 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Agnes Vernon. Morì nel maggio 1504, nel Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 94 anni, e fu sepolto a Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John V, Cokayne Esquireが1410年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルン ウィス マプレトンで生まれた時，父Sir John Cokayne MPは23歳，母Isabella Shirleyは34歳であった。彼はAgnes Vernonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1504年5月にイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンで94歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John V, Cokayne Esquire(이)가 1410년 영국 더비실르 애쉬보우른 위스 마플레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Cokayne MP(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Shirley(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Agnes Vernon(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1504년 5월 영국 더비실르 애쉬보우른에서 94세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 애쉬보우른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John V, Cokayne Esquire nasceu em 1410, em Ashbourne with Mapleton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Cokayne MP, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Shirley, tinha 34 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Agnes Vernon. Ele faleceu em maio de 1504, em Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 94 anos, e foi sepultado em Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John V, Cokayne Esquire родился в 1410 г. в местности ашбурн вит маплетон, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Cokayne MP было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Isabella Shirley, 34. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Agnes Vernon. Он умер май 1504 г. в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 94 лет и был похоронен в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John V, Cokayne Esquire nació en 1410, en Ashbourne with Mapleton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Cokayne MP, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Isabella Shirley, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Agnes Vernon. Murió en mayo de 1504, en Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 94 años, y fue sepultado en Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
